title: Disney Pixar Toy Story 4 Shaped Spiral Notebook with Pink Pen - Bo Peep
description:
Is your child a Toy Story fanatic? Then this officially licensed spiral notebook featuring Bo Peep from the hit Disney Pixar movie franchise is the perfect gift or stocking stuffer this holiday season! The uniquely shaped spiral notebook features a fun die-cut style, with graphics of Bo Peep "Saving One Toy at a Time" on the front. The inside of the notebook has cute Bo Peep and her loyal sheep printed on each page with pink notebook lines. The child's notebook also comes with a matching pink pen, making this a perfect back to school accessory. Young kids will love journaling, practicing handwriting and writing notes with their favorite character from Toy Story. Each notebook comes with 40 lined sheets.

Key Features

  • COOL DESIGN: Front and Back Adorned with Art of Bo Peep | Says, "Saving One Toy at a Time"
  • PORTABLE SIZE: 6” x 6” Notebook is Easy to Carry Around by Hand or in a Backpack.
  • DIE-CUT: Uniquely Shaped Notebook With Design of Bo Peep on Each Page | Add Excitement to Any Notetaking, Journaling or Homework
  • COMPLETE SET: Comes With Notebook and Pen | Great for Back to School!
